description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, allowing for ample natural light. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and a paved driveway leads to the main entrance. The front entryway features a covered porch with minimalist columns and a wide door. The rooftop includes open terrace spaces with railings, and the house is surrounded by a low fence and a sidewalk. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and outdoor integration.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with large windows, flat roof, landscaped yard, and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, symmetrical landscaping, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, large windows, and trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, backyard area, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the side yard, and the continuation of the sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main door under a covered porch with minimalist columns, steps, and landscaped approach
